data.author: jasiex01
data.message:
Add new URDF file for Rapha rover (#5)

* Add new URDF file for Rapha rover

* Improve collada materials visibility

* Remove capital letters from joint and link names

data.author: Bitterisland6
data.message: Add service definition for setting IMU calibration (#2)

data.author: cottsay
data.message:
Remove architecture_independent from leo_msgs (#1)

In ROS 1, message packages did not create any binaries and were
therefore architecture-independent packages.

In ROS 2, static typesupport results in library creation whenever
messages are generated, which are not architecture-independent.
